title: Coinbase investing into stablecoin reserves ETF issued by ProShares
message_html: Coinbase investing into stablecoin reserves ETF issued by ProShares ...
snippet: The fund, called ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF, has $22 billion in assets under management and launched this year.

title: Hamilton Lane's tokenized HLSCOPE fund launches on Tron, marking first Securitize asset on the network
message_html: Hamilton Lane's tokenized HLSCOPE fund launches on Tron, marking first Securitize asset on the network ...
snippet: Hamilton Lane’s tokenized Senior Credit Opportunities Fund will be the first Securitize-issued asset to launch on TRON.

title: Backpack launches securities platform blending traditional and tokenized stock trading
message_html: Backpack launches securities platform blending traditional and tokenized stock trading ...
snippet: Backpack Securities combines a U.S.-regulated brokerage for traditional equities ownership with a tokenization platform.
